title: Excalibur | Better ModList & Mod Menu Compat
description: Compatibility patch between Excalibur resourcepack and Better ModList & Mod Menu mods.
body:
This **unofficial** compatibility patch ensures that textures from the [**Better ModList**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-modlist) and [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) mods seamlessly integrate with the [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned **Better ModList** and **Mod Menu** mods buttons.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside **Excalibur**.

**Special thanks to:**
- [**Maffhew**](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - for the **Excalibur** resourcepack.
- [**1Foxy2**](https://modrinth.com/user/1Foxy2) - for the **Better ModList** mod.
- [**Prospector**](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector) - for the **Mod Menu** mod.

If you enjoyed this compatibility patch, feel free to tell others about it!
